name: DataExportEngine

neutralConcepts: F411 IExportEncryptionService PLATFORM-ONLY — tenant cannot disable or substitute
F412 IExportAuditService PLATFORM-ONLY — every export attempt recorded including failures
F423 IPIIMaskingService PLATFORM-ONLY — PII masking executes BEFORE dataset export
downloadUrl in DataExportReady MUST have expiresAt — non-expiring URLs are a security violation

ironRules.rule: F411 IExportEncryptionService is PLATFORM-ONLY — no bypass, no tenant override. Export encryption is non-negotiable.
F412 IExportAuditService is PLATFORM-ONLY — every export attempt (successful or failed) must be recorded. No bypass permitted.
F423 IPIIMaskingService PII masking executes BEFORE dataset export. Unmasked PII data must never reach the export payload.
DataExportReady event downloadUrl MUST include expiresAt field. Non-expiring download URLs are a security violation.
storeDocument(exportRecord) at ORDER N BEFORE enqueue(DataExportReady). DNA-8.

keywords: data export engine encryption audit PII masking platform-only download URL expiry export ready analytics warehouse
